description: Fragment of a letter to Efrayim b. Shemarya (fl. 1007–1055 CE), likely from one of the Geonim of Palestine, possibly sent in the name of Shelomo b. Yehuda, as Efrayim is titled "ḥaver" here. The letter was written after the holidays of Tishrei, and the writer reports that they did their best to follow Efrayim's request and organized a pesiqa for somebody. Information from Elinoar Bareket via FGP.
description_he: מכתב בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
